title: Reimagining the mouse pointer with AI
summary: Google DeepMind has developed an AI-enhanced mouse pointer that understands what is being pointed at and its contextual relevance. The system aims to modernize the half-century-old pointer interface by adding intelligence to interpret user intent and interface elements.
